name: jts-rustic-cuisine
description: JT's Rustic Cuisine — comfort food catering e-commerce platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w client && npm install -w server
